loop1.title: Voltage Monitor (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing live three-phase voltage trends (R-N, Y-N, B-N) and KPIs (Avg, Max, Min); y-axis ticks and threshold values are auto-scaled/static and not bound to specific logged columns.

loop1.title: Current Monitor (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing real-time current draw for R, Y, B phases and neutral; rated and contracted current thresholds are omitted because the asset's nameplate data is empty.
